calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2025 Set For Trial On Aug-10-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
SETH A. SAFIER, ESQ., GUTRIDE SAFIER LLP (415) 336-6545 Attorney for Plaintiff, TARA WIDMER AMAR S. NAIK, ESQ., ARENTFOX SCHIFF LLP 415.757.5500 amar.naik@afslaw.com Attorney for Defendant ZARA USA, INC

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ZARA USA, INC.'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendant Zara USA, Inc.'s demurrer to Tara Widmer's complaint is overruled.

(SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING)

Order is signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
